description: Looks up administrative blocking or restriction reason fields for one exact Danish registration number. Use when a user asks whether a vehicle is blocked, restricted, or has a registry blocking reason.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-vehicles-flat | WHERE plate == ?registration_number | KEEP plate, vehicle_id, brand, model, vehicle_category, registration_status_date, blocking_reason | LIMIT 10

registration_number.description: Exact Danish registration number, for example EN44360
